content.json:
# LLM Token Usage Dashboard

Monitors token consumption across all agents, users, teams, and models in Conversation Knowledge Mining Solution Accelerator.

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Token_Usage_Summary'
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| extend input_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_input_tokens'])
| extend output_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_output_tokens'])
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_tokens'])
| summarize
    TotalConversations = count(),
    TotalInputTokens = sum(input_tokens),
    TotalOutputTokens = sum(output_tokens),
    TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens),
    AvgTokensPerConversation = round(avg(total_tokens), 0)
content.title: Overall Token Usage Summary

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Token_Usage_Summary'
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| extend input_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_input_tokens'])
| extend output_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_output_tokens'])
| summarize InputTokens = sum(input_tokens), OutputTokens = sum(output_tokens) by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Token Usage Over Time (Hourly)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Agent_Token_Usage'
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| extend agent = tostring(customDimensions['agent_name'])
| extend input_tokens = toint(customDimensions['input_tokens'])
| extend output_tokens = toint(customDimensions['output_tokens'])
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_tokens'])
| summarize
    InputTokens = sum(input_tokens),
    OutputTokens = sum(output_tokens),
    TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens),
    Invocations = count()
    by Agent = agent
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: Token Usage by Agent

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Agent_Token_Usage'
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| extend agent = tostring(customDimensions['agent_name'])
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_tokens'])
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens) by agent
content.title: Token Distribution by Agent

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Team_Token_Usage'
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| extend team = tostring(customDimensions['team_name'])
| extend input_tokens = toint(customDimensions['input_tokens'])
| extend output_tokens = toint(customDimensions['output_tokens'])
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_tokens'])
| summarize
    InputTokens = sum(input_tokens),
    OutputTokens = sum(output_tokens),
    TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens),
    Conversations = count(),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(tostring(customDimensions['user_id']))
    by Team = team
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: Token Usage by Team

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Team_Token_Usage'
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| extend team = tostring(customDimensions['team_name'])
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_tokens'])
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens) by bin(timestamp, 1h), team
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Team Token Usage Over Time

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_User_Token_Usage'
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| extend user_id = tostring(customDimensions['user_id'])
| extend input_tokens = toint(customDimensions['input_tokens'])
| extend output_tokens = toint(customDimensions['output_tokens'])
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_tokens'])
| summarize
    InputTokens = sum(input_tokens),
    OutputTokens = sum(output_tokens),
    TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens),
    Conversations = count()
    by User = user_id
| order by TotalTokens desc
| take 20
content.title: Top 20 Token-Consuming Users

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_User_Token_Usage'
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| extend user_id = tostring(customDimensions['user_id'])
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_tokens'])
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens) by bin(timestamp, 1h), user_id
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: User Token Usage Over Time

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Model_Token_Usage'
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions['model_deployment_name'])
| extend input_tokens = toint(customDimensions['input_tokens'])
| extend output_tokens = toint(customDimensions['output_tokens'])
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_tokens'])
| summarize
    InputTokens = sum(input_tokens),
    OutputTokens = sum(output_tokens),
    TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens),
    Invocations = count()
    by Model = model
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: Token Usage by Model

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Model_Token_Usage'
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions['model_deployment_name'])
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_tokens'])
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens) by model
content.title: Token Distribution by Model

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Model_Token_Usage'
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions['model_deployment_name'])
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_tokens'])
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens) by bin(timestamp, 1h), model
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Model Token Usage Over Time

content.query:
let input_price_per_million = 2.50;
let output_price_per_million = 10.00;
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Token_Usage_Summary'
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| extend input_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_input_tokens'])
| extend output_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_output_tokens'])
| summarize TotalInput = sum(input_tokens), TotalOutput = sum(output_tokens) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| extend InputCost = round(TotalInput * input_price_per_million / 1000000.0, 4)
| extend OutputCost = round(TotalOutput * output_price_per_million / 1000000.0, 4)
| extend TotalCost = InputCost + OutputCost
| project Day = timestamp, TotalInput, TotalOutput, InputCost, OutputCost, TotalCost
| order by Day desc
content.title: Estimated Daily Cost (GPT-4o Pricing: $2.50/1M input, $10.00/1M output)

content.query:
let gpt4o_input = 2.50;
let gpt4o_output = 10.00;
let gpt4o_mini_input = 0.15;
let gpt4o_mini_output = 0.60;
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Model_Token_Usage'
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions['model_deployment_name'])
| extend input_tokens = toint(customDimensions['input_tokens'])
| extend output_tokens = toint(customDimensions['output_tokens'])
| summarize TotalInput = sum(input_tokens), TotalOutput = sum(output_tokens) by model
| extend InputPrice = case(model has "mini", gpt4o_mini_input, gpt4o_input)
| extend OutputPrice = case(model has "mini", gpt4o_mini_output, gpt4o_output)
| extend InputCost = round(TotalInput * InputPrice / 1000000.0, 4)
| extend OutputCost = round(TotalOutput * OutputPrice / 1000000.0, 4)
| extend TotalCost = InputCost + OutputCost
| project Model = model, TotalInput, TotalOutput, InputCost, OutputCost, TotalCost
| order by TotalCost desc
content.title: Estimated Cost by Model

content.query:
let input_price_per_million = 2.50;
let output_price_per_million = 10.00;
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Team_Token_Usage'
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| extend team = tostring(customDimensions['team_name'])
| extend input_tokens = toint(customDimensions['input_tokens'])
| extend output_tokens = toint(customDimensions['output_tokens'])
| summarize TotalInput = sum(input_tokens), TotalOutput = sum(output_tokens) by team
| extend InputCost = round(TotalInput * input_price_per_million / 1000000.0, 4)
| extend OutputCost = round(TotalOutput * output_price_per_million / 1000000.0, 4)
| extend TotalCost = InputCost + OutputCost
| project Team = team, TotalInput, TotalOutput, InputCost, OutputCost, TotalCost
| order by TotalCost desc
content.title: Estimated Cost by Team

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Token_Usage_Summary'
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_tokens'])
| summarize
    p50 = percentile(total_tokens, 50),
    p90 = percentile(total_tokens, 90),
    p95 = percentile(total_tokens, 95),
    p99 = percentile(total_tokens, 99),
    Max = max(total_tokens)
content.title: Token Usage Percentiles Per Conversation

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Token_Usage_Summary'
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_tokens'])
| summarize
    ConversationsProcessed = count(),
    TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens),
    AvgTokensPerConversation = round(avg(total_tokens), 0),
    MaxTokensPerConversation = max(total_tokens)
    by Day = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by Day desc
content.title: Daily Conversation Volume with Token Usage
